raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to urgently request a supervisor-level appeal regarding the {$26.00} charge from " XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX '' on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX ( Card ending in XXXX ). 

There are key facts and documented evidence that were overlooked in the original investigation and demonstrate that I was subject to coercive sales tactics and denied service unless I paid for unwanted insurance. 

XXXX. Insurance Clearly Marked as Optional XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX counter, there is clearly posted signage stating that all insurance options, including XXXX, are optional. I have attached a photo taken on-site showing this exact sign titled Optional Services Description. 
Despite this, the staff told me that they would not release the vehicle keys unless I paid for their XXXX insurance, even though I informed them I had valid coverage. 

XXXX. Comparison with XXXX No Forced Insurance During the same trip, I rented from XXXX at the same airport. XXXX allowed me to decline insurance without issue and handed over the keys. This proves that forced insurance is not required by law, by airport rules, or by industry norms this was purely a case of XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXmposing unfair conditions. 

XXXX. Photo Proof Attached Please see the attached image of the signage at XXXX XXXX  counter, which clearly shows that insurance options are Optional Services. 
This photo is dated XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX and directly contradicts XXXX  claim that the insurance was required.
